custom_instructions: Create a high-energy, informative podcast-style discussion between two experts exploring the convergence of Digital Twin technology and Artificial Intelligence in modern manufacturing. The conversation should define Digital Twins as dynamic digital replicas that synchronize with physical CNC machine tools using real-time sensor data. Delve into specific AI methodologies for tool wear prediction and thermal error compensation, comparing traditional machine learning like Support Vector Machines (SVM) with advanced deep learning models like CNN-LSTM hybrids. Discuss the transition from reactive 'run-to-failure' strategies to proactive predictive maintenance (PdM) and how these technologies collectively reduce downtime, optimize energy consumption, and improve product quality. Ensure the tone is professional yet accessible, focusing on the practical benefits for Industry 4.0 environments while briefly acknowledging challenges like data interoperability and cybersecurity.
